data_science.title: Closing the Reflection Gap: A Free Calibration Bonus for Agentic RL
data_science.why_trending: Addresses the critical reflection gap in LLM agents through reinforcement learning, enabling agents to better assess their own performance from environment feedback—highly relevant for agentic AI systems.

data_science.title: When Should Agent Trust Be Conditional? Characterizing and Attacking Skill-Conditional Reputation in Agent Swarms
data_science.why_trending: Proposes skill-conditional trust for heterogeneous agent swarms, moving beyond global reputation scores to exploit specialization—critical for multi-agent platforms.

data_science.title: Gradient boosting for extremes: sampling theory and application to insurance
data_science.why_trending: Develops statistical learning theory for gradient boosting on extreme-value distributions with non-asymptotic bounds—important for insurance and tail-risk modeling.
topics: Extreme Value Theory and Risk Modeling

data_science.title: Nonlocal Bayesian Modeling of Continuous Spatio-Temporal Dynamics
data_science.why_trending: Introduces a hierarchical Bayesian framework for continuous spatio-temporal forecasting with nonlocal interactions, addressing long-range spatial coupling—essential for complex physical systems.

data_science.title: Operator Calculus for Population-Based Optimization: A Mean-Field Convergence Theory
data_science.why_trending: Provides unified operator calculus theory for population-based optimization methods, bridging fragmented convergence analyses across evolution strategies and distributional methods.

finance.title: Battery Bidding under Price Uncertainty in Wholesale Electricity Markets
finance.why_trending: Models battery bidding in wholesale electricity markets under price uncertainty using mean-CVaR objectives, addressing renewable energy integration in financial markets.

finance.title: The Mathematics of Heuristic Portfolio Optimization (HPO)
finance.why_trending: Develops Heuristic Portfolio Optimization theory showing closed-form optimality sets for practical allocation rules like HRP, bridging practitioner heuristics and theory.

finance.title: CFOs Meet LLMs
finance.why_trending: Demonstrates that LLMs can forecast CFO sentiment and business optimism, offering scalable alternatives to traditional survey-based business cycle indicators.

finance.title: Reverse Stress Testing for Multivariate Scenarios: A Conditional Framework for Stressed Time Series
finance.why_trending: Develops reverse stress testing framework for multivariate scenarios coherent with empirical dependence, addressing regulatory requirements for interconnected risk.

finance.title: Quantum Horizon: An evaluation of quantum computing as a threat to Bitcoin and Ethereum
finance.why_trending: Comprehensive assessment of quantum computing threats to Bitcoin and Ethereum, clarifying misconceptions about Shor vs. Grover algorithms for blockchain security.

social_sciences.title: Prediction-Powered Causal Inference by Automatic Debiased Machine Learning and Semi-Supervised Riesz Regression
social_sciences.why_trending: Develops prediction-powered causal inference using unlabeled auxiliary data to improve efficiency bounds, enabling better use of semi-supervised information in econometrics.

social_sciences.title: Evaluating the Impact of Rhode Island's Self-Sustaining Reemployment Services and Eligibility Assessment (RESEA) Program on Employment Outcomes
social_sciences.why_trending: Large-scale RCT (N=23,549) evaluating RESEA reemployment services shows measurable wage and UI duration effects, providing empirical evidence for labor market policy.

social_sciences.title: Price Elasticity of Gas Demand on L1 and L2: Evidence from Ethereum and Arbitrum
social_sciences.why_trending: Estimates causal price elasticity of gas demand on Ethereum/Arbitrum using IV strategies, advancing understanding of fee mechanisms in Layer 2 blockchains.

social_sciences.title: Wealth Inequality and Planetary Boundaries in a Stylized Agent-Based Model
social_sciences.why_trending: Agent-based model exploring wealth inequality's impact on ecological transition, revealing how distributional factors constrain climate policy effectiveness.

social_sciences.title: Semiparametric Local Projections
social_sciences.why_trending: Proposes semiparametric local projections for nonlinear impulse response functions, enabling flexible macroeconomic analysis with state-dependent effects.

topics.name: LLM-based Agents and Reinforcement Learning
topics.summary: Papers on deploying LLMs as autonomous agents with RL-based learning, including reflection calibration, skill-conditional trust, and equilibrium learning in control problems.

topics.name: Spatio-Temporal Modeling and Forecasting
topics.summary: Methods for modeling continuous-time dynamics with irregular observations, including Bayesian frameworks for nonlocal interactions, hierarchical ODE clustering, and black-box adaptation.

topics.name: Portfolio Optimization and Allocation
topics.summary: Frameworks for optimal asset allocation under uncertainty, including heuristic optimization, nonlinear extrapolation under stochastic volatility, and mean-variance under ambiguity.

topics.name: Causal Inference Methods
topics.summary: Advanced econometric and statistical methods for causal identification including prediction-powered inference, granular instrumental variables, and semiparametric local projections.

topics.name: Risk Management and Stress Testing
topics.summary: Methodologies for quantifying and managing financial and operational risk, including reverse stress testing, scenario generation, chokepoint disruption modeling, and bootstrap methods.

topics.name: Gradient Boosting and Extreme Value Theory
topics.summary: Statistical learning theory for gradient boosting applied to extremes and comparative analysis of Adam vs. SGD, with implications for tail-risk and machine learning optimization.

topics.name: Labor Market Policy and Employment
topics.summary: Empirical evaluation of employment programs, analysis of AI exposure inequality by caste, and skill-education labor mismatch effects on earnings.

topics.name: Blockchain Economics and DeFi
topics.summary: Economic analysis of cryptocurrency markets including gas demand elasticity, PoS staking incentives, post-quantum DeFi security, and quantum threats to blockchain.

topics.name: LLM Applications in Finance and Economics
topics.summary: Use of large language models for business sentiment forecasting and human-in-the-loop economic research, demonstrating scalable alternatives to traditional survey methods.

topics.name: Environmental Economics and Sustainability
topics.summary: Agent-based and RegTech approaches to wealth inequality-environment nexus, green-digital transformation, and trustworthy data sharing in supply chains.
